The Problem

Why Traditional CRMs
Fail Real Estate Agents

You're not a salesperson. You're a relationship builder. Your CRM should understand the difference.

😤

Built for Sales Teams, Not Agents

Generic CRMs have no concept of home anniversaries, mortgage renewals, or sphere-of-influence nurturing. They're pipeline tools duct-taped for real estate.

✓ SphereFlow is built for real estate, day one
📱

App Overload Kills Productivity

The average agent uses Follow Up Boss + Mailchimp + Buffer + Canva + Jasper. That's 5 subscriptions, 5 logins, and 5 ways for things to fall through the cracks.

✓ SphereFlow replaces all five
💔

Referrals Are Tracked in Notebooks

40–60% of agent business comes from referrals. Yet almost no CRM tracks which contacts send you business, what those relationships are worth, or when to ask again.

✓ SphereFlow's Referral Engine tracks everything
Platform Modules

Everything an Agent Needs.
One Platform.

Seven fully integrated systems that work together so you can focus on what you do best — building relationships and closing deals.

Sphere Management

Know Every Contact
Like a Best Friend

Every person in your sphere gets a complete profile — not just a name and phone number. Birthdays, home purchase dates, mortgage renewals, family details, referral history, and a full interaction timeline. The CRM that remembers so you don't have to.

  • ✓Complete contact profiles with 20+ real-estate specific fields
  • ✓Full interaction timeline: calls, texts, emails, showings, meetings
  • ✓Smart tags: Buyer, Seller, Investor, Past Client, VIP, Hot Lead
  • ✓Sphere Health Score — know who needs attention today
  • ✓Property portfolio tracking per contact
  • ✓Nova conversation summaries and suggested next steps

Nova

Meet Nova
Your 24/7 Growth Partner

Nova lives inside every part of the platform. Write follow-ups in seconds, generate listing captions, get lead score predictions, and receive next-step recommendations — all without leaving the CRM.

  • ✓Nova follow-up — personalized to each contact's history
  • ✓Listing description & Instagram caption generator
  • ✓Conversation summarizer — 6 months in 3 sentences
  • ✓Lead score prediction — know who's closing next
  • ✓Objection handler — 3 scripts for any pushback
  • ✓Market report writer with local MLS data
You
Write a follow-up text for the Chen family — we toured 3 homes last Tuesday and they loved the one on Maple Street.
AI
AI
"Hi Sarah & James! 👋 Loved showing you those homes on Tuesday — especially the Maple St. one. The backyard and open kitchen checked so many of your boxes. Wanted to see if any questions came up since then? Happy to run some comparable sales numbers if that helps you feel good about the price. Talk soon! — [Your name]"

Content Engine

Never Wonder What
to Post Again

The only real estate CRM with a built-in social media system. Weekly content prompts, Nova caption generation, reel scripts, and a full post scheduler — replacing Buffer, Canva, and Jasper in one tool.

Automation Engine

Follow Up While
You Sleep

Referral Engine

Turn Closings Into
More Closings

Systematize the most valuable part of your business. The Referral Engine tracks every referral given and received, automates post-close sequences, and shows you exactly which relationships drive your revenue.

  • ✓Post-close automation: review request → referral ask in 6 steps
  • ✓Track referrals given, received, and converted
  • ✓Revenue attribution per referral relationship
  • ✓Top referral source leaderboard
  • ✓Referral partner network for agent-broker co-marketing

Why Agents Switch

7 Features Your Current CRM
Simply Doesn't Have

These aren't nice-to-haves. They're the exact reasons agents close more deals — and why they don't go back.

01
🏡

Home Anniversary Automation

A personalized message every year on the purchase date. The most powerful relationship touchpoint in real estate — and most agents miss it entirely.

02
🔄

Mortgage Renewal Tracking

Know exactly when every client's mortgage renews. A $10,000 referral opportunity — per client — that no standard CRM tracks.

03
💸

Referral Engine with Revenue Attribution

See exactly who sends you business, what it's worth, and when to ask for more. Turn your best clients into your best salespeople.

04
🤖

Nova Follow-Up

The #1 thing agents procrastinate on — writing follow-ups — solved in 2 seconds. Personalized, contextual, and ready to send. No more blank page.

05
⚡

Lead Response Speed Tracking

Leads contacted in under 5 minutes convert at 9x the rate of leads contacted after 30 minutes. SphereFlow auto-responds while you're with a client.

06
🔔

Past Client Revival Alerts

After 180 days of silence, SphereFlow flags the contact and drafts a personalized re-engagement message. Steal-proof your database.

07
📱

Built-In Content Prompts

No other real estate CRM tells you what to post today. Weekly prompts, AI captions, and a full scheduler — your social media strategy, done.
